MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-30-2010 IN 206, DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. ATTORNEY DAVID ERICKSON APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE TRIAL DATE OF 4/26/10 IS CONTINUED TO 11/1/10 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED, AND THE COURT WILL SEND NOTICE OF THE NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. HAVING A NON-OPPOSITION FILED BY PLAINTIFF, THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS DEFENDANT TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MINI MINUTES: Consolidated with Case No.CGC-09-488022 Miller vs. Robinson, and Case No.CGC-09-489529 Jones vs. Robinson. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. Notice And Motion For Application For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ROBERT JONES Motion for Application for Determination of Good Faith Settlement. The parties to the settlement are Plaintiffs Edward Miller, for himself and as successor in interest of Diane Adele Wright, deceased, and Starletta Miller, for herself and as successor in interest of Diane Adele Wright, deceased, and defendant Robert Louis Jones. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.)
